User Story: As a user, I click the Home icon so I return to the agent canvas.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Clicking Home sets activeNav='home'; canvas is always rendered; any open right panel (store/settings/workflows) closes.

User Story: As a user, I click the Chat icon so I open a chat surface.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Clicking Chat sets activeNav='chat'. EXPECTED: a chat surface appears. ACTUAL RISK: page.tsx renders no panel for activeNav==='chat' (ChatPanel is gated on chatAgentId, not nav) — dead-end.

User Story: As a user, I click the Workflows icon so I manage workflows.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Clicking Workflows sets activeNav='workflows'; WorkflowsPanel slides in; onClose returns to home.

User Story: As a user, I click the Store icon so I browse MCPs/tools/skills.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Clicking Store sets activeNav='store'; StorePanel slides in; onClose returns to home.

User Story: As a user, I click the Settings icon so I configure providers/models.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Clicking Settings sets activeNav='settings'; SettingsPanel opens; onClose returns to home.

User Story: As a user, I click + New Agent so I create an agent.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Clicking opens CreateAgentPanel (showCreateAgent=true).

User Story: As a user, I see a badge when approvals are pending.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Amber pulsing badge shows approvalCount when >0; hidden when 0. Count comes from useApprovals().

User Story: As a user, I see running/idle/approval counts in the footer.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): StatusBar shows running (green), idle (gray), approval (amber if>0) counts from useAgentCounts/useApprovals.

User Story: As a user, I see LLM calls/cost/models/tools metrics.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): StatusBar shows llmCallsToday, estimatedCost, modelsConnected, toolsActive. RISK: page.tsx hardcodes llmCallsToday=0, estimatedCost=0, toolsActive=0 (never wired); only modelsConnected is live.

User Story: As a desktop user, on first launch a key is generated and stored in my OS keychain.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): VaultGate detects no passphrase, generates one, stores in keychain (vault-passphrase), opens SQLCipher DB, shows setup spinner, then renders app.

User Story: As a returning desktop user, my encrypted DB unlocks on launch.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): VaultGate retrieves passphrase, runs PRAGMA key before migrations, shows decrypt spinner, renders app on success.

User Story: As a user, if unlock fails I see an error and can retry.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): On vault error VaultGate shows error icon + message + Retry button that re-attempts unlock.

User Story: As a web-mode user, the vault gate does not block me.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): When __TAURI_INTERNALS__ absent, VaultGate renders children directly (degraded shell, no native persistence).

User Story: As a user, I see all my agents as cards on the canvas.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): On load initDb + AgentRepository.findAll() populates agents; each renders as an AgentCardNode in React Flow.

User Story: As a user, I drag an agent card and its position is saved.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Dragging updates node position; onNodeDragStop persists canvas_x/canvas_y via AgentRepository.updatePosition.

User Story: As a user, my canvas pan/zoom is remembered.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Canvas loads saved viewport from canvas_state on mount; persists viewport changes.

User Story: As a user, I see each agent's live status with color.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Card shows status dot+label (IDLE gray / RUNNING emerald glow / APPROVAL amber pulse / ERROR red / STOPPED gray) from useAgentStatus.

User Story: As a user, I see the latest agent actions on its card.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): ActionFeed shows last 4 actions (info/warn/success/error icons) from useAgentActions; auto-scrolls.

User Story: As a user, I double-click an agent card to chat with it.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Double-click (or Open) calls onOpenChat(agentId) -> sets chatAgentId -> ChatPanel opens.

User Story: As a user, I click the pencil on a card to edit the agent.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Edit button calls onEdit(agentId) -> EditAgentPanel opens for that agent.

User Story: As a user, I approve or deny a pending action directly on the card.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Pending approvals render an inline ApprovalGate; Approve/Deny emit approval-resolved on the bus.

User Story: As a user, I open the New Agent panel.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): CreateAgentPanel slides in when open=true; resets fields (name empty, type 'llm').

User Story: As a user, I cannot create an agent without a name.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Submitting with empty/whitespace name shows a validation error and blocks create.

User Story: As a user, I choose LLM / Claude Code / Codex.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Type toggle stores 'llm'|'coding-agent'|'custom'; LLM-only fields (model, prompt) show only for 'llm'.

User Story: As an LLM-agent creator, I pick a configured model.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Model dropdown lists ModelRepository.findAll(); selection stored as modelId on create.

User Story: As an LLM-agent creator, I set a system prompt.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Textarea value persisted as systemPrompt (LLM only; '' for coding agents).

User Story: As a user with no models, I get a link to Settings.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): When model list empty, panel shows 'add in Settings' link calling onNavigateToSettings.

User Story: As a user, creating an agent saves it and shows it on the canvas.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): agentRepo.create() returns row; onCreated appends to agents state; card appears.

User Story: As a user, I edit an agent's name/model/prompt.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): EditAgentPanel loads agent, edits name/model/systemPrompt, Save calls AgentRepository.update.

User Story: As a user, I assign installed tools to an agent.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Tools checkbox list (installed tools); Save persists toolIds via update; 'None installed' empty state.

User Story: As a user, I assign installed MCP servers to an agent.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): MCP checkbox list; Save persists mcpIds; 'None installed' empty state.

User Story: As a user, I assign skills to an agent.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Skills checkbox list (useSkills); stored as skill:<name> within toolIds; 'None installed' empty state.

User Story: As a user, saving edits updates the card.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): onSaved replaces the agent row in page state -> card reflects new name/model.

User Story: As a user, opening chat loads or creates a session.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): ChatPanel on mount loads existing session for agent (findByAgentId) or creates one; loads message history.

User Story: As a user, I press Enter to send a message.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Enter sends (Shift+Enter newline); message added, agent run started, persisted to session.

User Story: As a user, I watch the assistant stream its reply.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Agent run yields text deltas; ChatPanel shows a streaming bubble with animated indicator; finalizes on completion.

User Story: As a user, I see live tool-call activity rows during a turn.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): tool-call/tool-result events render 🔧 rows (running/done/error + detail); display-only, never persisted.

User Story: As a user, I see a visible error if the agent fails.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): error AgentEvent renders an ephemeral red bubble; status set to error; not persisted.

User Story: As a user, I approve/deny tool calls inline in chat.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Pending approvals for the active agent render an ApprovalGate inside ChatPanel.

User Story: As a user, my conversation persists across reopen.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Non-ephemeral messages saved via SessionRepository.updateMessages; reload restores history.

User Story: As a user, an empty chat invites me to start.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Empty session shows 'Send a message to start chatting'.

User Story: As a user, I close the chat panel.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Close (X) calls onClose -> chatAgentId=null -> panel hides.

User Story: As a user, approving lets the gated tool run.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Approve resolves the approval promise true; tool proceeds; approval-resolved emitted; audit logged.

User Story: As a user, denying blocks the gated tool.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Deny resolves promise false; tool throws/aborts; approval-resolved emitted.

User Story: As a user, I see a risk level on each approval.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Badge shows low(yellow)/medium(orange)/high(red) per request.risk.

User Story: As a user, I switch between Providers and Models.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): SettingsPanel left nav toggles activeSection providers|models; default providers.

User Story: As a user, I add Anthropic/Google/OpenAI with an API key.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): AddProviderForm: select provider, enter API key, Save stores key in keychain (ref provider+'-key').

User Story: As a user, I add Ollama with a base URL and no key.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Ollama branch shows Base URL (default localhost:11434), no API-key field; persisted as baseUrl provider.

User Story: As a user, I test a provider before saving.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Test button calls provider.listModels/credential check; shows 'Connected · Xms' or an error.

User Story: As a user, I see configured providers and can remove one.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Configured Providers list with remove; remove deletes keychain ref + model rows.

User Story: As a desktop user, I sign in to Claude/Codex CLI subscriptions.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): CliProviderRow shows status dot + label (Desktop only/Not installed/Signed out/Signed in); Login opens browser flow; Re-check re-queries auth.

User Story: As a user, I add a model in two steps (provider then model).
Expected Behavior (derived from code): AddModelDialog step1 provider grid; step2 fetches models with loading/error states; Add persists a models row.

User Story: As a user, I get clear errors if model fetch fails.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Shows 'Ollama not running' / 'Could not fetch models' / 'Could not list models' per failure.

User Story: As a user, I view and delete configured models.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): ModelList shows provider badge + names; delete removes the row; empty + loading states.

User Story: As a user, I browse the MCP server catalog.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): StorePanel MCP tab lists MCP_CATALOG (filesystem/github/brave-search/memory) via StoreItemRow.

User Story: As a user, I search to filter store items.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Search bar filters items by name/description across the active tab.

User Story: As a user, I install or remove an MCP server.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Install creates an mcps row (spinner during); installed shows remove; useInstalledMcps tracks state.

User Story: As a user, I assign an installed item to specific agents.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): StoreItemRow expander shows agent checkboxes; toggling persists assignment (toolIds/mcpIds); 'No agents yet' empty state.

User Story: As a user, I add a custom MCP via the footer form.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): MCP tab footer input + Add creates a custom mcps row.

User Story: As a user, I install a built-in tool.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Tools tab lists TOOL_REGISTRY tools; install creates a tools row; useInstalledTools tracks installed.

User Story: As a user, I view skills and create a new one.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Skills tab lists ~/.acc/skills via useSkills; footer Create form writes a skill file (write_skill).

User Story: As a user, I see all saved workflows.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): WorkflowsPanel lists WorkflowRepository.findAll with name + updated timestamp; 'No workflows yet.' empty.

User Story: As a user, I create a new workflow.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): 'New workflow' creates an untitled workflows row and opens the editor.

User Story: As a user, I delete a workflow.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Delete (hover) removes the row via WorkflowRepository.delete; list refreshes.

User Story: As a user, I open a workflow in the editor.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Clicking a workflow opens WorkflowEditor with its nodes/edges; Back returns to list.

User Story: As a user, I add nodes from the palette.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): NodePalette groups nodes by category (I/O, Compute, Control); click adds a node to canvas.

User Story: As a user, I connect compatible ports only.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): onConnect uses port-compat; incompatible wires rejected with 'Incompatible port types' alert.

User Story: As a user, I configure a selected node.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Selecting a node opens NodeConfigRail rendering the node def's ConfigPanel; changes persisted to node config.

User Story: As a user, I save the workflow graph.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Save persists nodes/edges via WorkflowRepository.update; updated_at bumped.

User Story: As a user, I run a workflow with an input.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Run opens RunModal; input parsed as JSON or raw string; engine executes; useWorkflowRun streams status.

User Story: As a user, I see per-node status during a run.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): WorkflowNodeCard ring reflects pending(amber)/running(indigo)/done(emerald)/error(red) from node-status events.

User Story: As a user, I see past runs of a workflow.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): History toggle shows WorkflowRunHistory from workflow_runs.findByWorkflowId; status/time/result; 'No runs yet.' empty.

User Story: As a user, I re-run a past run with the same input.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Re-run button replays runWith(prevInput); history refreshes.

User Story: As a workflow author, the start node injects the run input.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): start: no inputs, output 'value'; engine seeds __runInput onto it.

User Story: As a workflow author, the output node yields the result.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): output: input 'value', no outputs; engine reads gathered input as run result (null if unconnected).

User Story: As a workflow author, an agent node runs an agent on input.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): agent: resolves agentId, renders promptTemplate {{input}}, runs provider, outputs accumulated text+result.

User Story: As a workflow author, a tool node calls one built-in tool.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): tool: parses argsTemplate JSON with {{input}}, calls tool.execute, outputs result.

User Story: As a workflow author, a transform reshapes input safely.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): transform: applyTemplate({{path}}) then JSON.parse if valid (no eval); outputs json/string.

User Story: As a workflow author, a conditional routes input by predicate.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): conditional: evalPredicate(path,op,value) routes input to true/false port; engine prunes other branch.

User Story: As a workflow author, a join merges parallel branches.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): join: waits for N inputs, merges to {in1..inN}; barrier in readiness engine.

User Story: As a workflow author, a loop iterates a sub-workflow over an array.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): loop: runs referenced sub-workflow per item, bounded by maxIterations (default 100); outputs results array.

User Story: As a user, I chat using Claude models.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): AnthropicProvider exposes Opus 4.8 / Sonnet 4.6 / Haiku 4.5; createAdapter with keychain key; streams.

User Story: As a user, I chat using OpenAI/compatible models.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): OpenAIProvider gpt-4o/gpt-4o-mini/o3; optional baseUrl for compatible endpoints.

User Story: As a user, I chat using Gemini models.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): GoogleProvider gemini 2.5 pro/flash, 2.0 flash; api-key auth.

User Story: As a user, I chat using local Ollama models.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): OllamaProvider lists models from /api/tags; throws on unreachable (never returns []).

User Story: As a desktop user, I chat via my Claude subscription CLI.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): claude-cli provider builds CliLanguageModel shelling out to claude -p; desktop-only.

User Story: As a desktop user, I chat via my Codex subscription CLI.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): codex-cli provider shells out to codex exec; desktop-only.

User Story: As a user, my LLM agent calls assigned tools in a bounded loop.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): llm-agent injects skills, passes tools + stopWhen stepCountIs(8), emits tool-call/result; approval-gated.

User Story: As a user, my Claude Code agent runs the claude CLI in a project dir.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): claude-code-agent spawns claude --print stream-json; requires projectDirectory; streams; 30s idle timeout.

User Story: As a user, my Codex agent runs the codex CLI.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): codex-agent spawns codex (suggest/quiet); streams; stdin approvals.

User Story: As an agent, I read a file inside allowed paths.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): file_read checks allowedPaths, calls fs_read_text (re-checked in Rust); desktop-only.

User Story: As an agent, I write a file inside allowed paths (gated).
Expected Behavior (derived from code): file_write approval-gated; checks allowedPaths; fs_write_text creates dirs; desktop-only.

User Story: As an agent with shell enabled, I run a command (gated).
Expected Behavior (derived from code): shell requires shellEnabled; approval-gated; runs via run_process_blocking; returns stdout/stderr/exit.

User Story: As an agent, web_search/browser/image_generation report needing configuration.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Each throws a clear 'needs configuration in Settings' error (no silent failure).

User Story: As a user, my agent connects to a stdio MCP server.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): TauriStdioClientTransport frames JSON-RPC over spawn_process/send_stdin; desktop-only; failed servers skipped.

User Story: As a user, my agent connects to an SSE MCP server.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): SSE transport works in renderer (web+desktop).

User Story: As a user, my local data is encrypted at rest.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): SQLCipher vault keyed before migrations; raw file has no plaintext/SQLite header.

User Story: As a security-conscious user, agent actions are auditable.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): audit_log append-only (no update/delete); records action_type/payload/approved_by.

User Story: As a user, my API keys live only in the OS keychain.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): get/set/deleteSecret bridge to Rust keychain commands; DB stores only references.

User Story: As a user, my skills are stored as markdown files.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): list/read/write_skill in ~/.acc/skills; safe_skill_path rejects traversal/absolute/nested/non-md.
